summary: Comprehensive testing of LinguaFlow voice conversation agent completed successfully. Backend APIs achieve 100% success rate with critical voice-message endpoint now working perfectly with real audio file. Frontend functionality excellent with 95%+ success across all features including voice/text toggle, chat interactions, navigation, dashboard stats, and vocabulary management.

integration_issues.issue: AI responses may take 5-10 seconds to appear in chat (normal LLM processing time)

design_issues.issue: Dialog overlay sometimes intercepts clicks requiring force=True for form submission

passed_tests: Backend API: POST /api/conversations/{id}/voice-message - REAL audio file (63,840 bytes) successfully transcribed 'Hello, I want to practice my English pronunciation' with AI response and 2.4MB TTS audio
Backend API: POST /api/tts - returns 86,400 char audio_base64 successfully
Backend API: POST /api/conversations/{id}/messages - text messages with AI responses working
Backend API: GET /api/scenarios - returns 8 scenarios correctly
Backend API: POST /api/conversations - creates conversations successfully
Backend API: GET /api/conversations - lists conversations with proper structure
Backend API: GET /api/conversations/{id}/messages - retrieves message history
Backend API: GET /api/progress - returns comprehensive progress stats (6 conversations, 10 messages, 2 vocabulary words)
Backend API: POST /api/vocabulary - saves vocabulary words successfully
Backend API: GET /api/vocabulary - lists vocabulary with proper structure
Backend API: DELETE /api/vocabulary/{id} - deletes vocabulary successfully
Backend API: DELETE /api/conversations/{id} - conversation cleanup working
Frontend: Landing page loads with navbar and hero section 'Speak English with confidence'
Frontend: Navigation from landing to chat page working perfectly
Frontend: Chat page defaults to voice mode with microphone button visible
Frontend: Voice/text mode toggle working correctly with proper UI state changes
Frontend: Text mode displays textarea and send button properly
Frontend: Voice mode shows large microphone button with 'Tap to start speaking' text
Frontend: Text message sending functionality working (user messages appear)
Frontend: AI response processing indicated by typing indicator with 'L' avatar
Frontend: Dashboard navigation and loading working with comprehensive stats display
Frontend: Vocabulary page navigation and word list display (2 words: Eloquent, Ephemeral)
Frontend: Add vocabulary word functionality working with proper form fields
